title: Case Converter
short_description: Convert text between uppercase, lowercase, sentence case, title case, and other formats instantly with this simple and fast case converter tool.

title: Find & Replace
short_description: Quickly find specific words or phrases in your text and replace them with new content. Ideal for editing large blocks of text efficiently.

title: Line Break Remover
short_description: Remove unwanted line breaks from copied or formatted text and merge lines into clean paragraphs for easier editing and formatting.

title: Random Text Generator
short_description: Generate random words, sentences, or paragraphs instantly for placeholder text, design mockups, testing layouts, or development purposes.

title: Slug Generator
short_description: Create clean and SEO-friendly URL slugs from titles or text by removing spaces, special characters, and unnecessary formatting.

title: Text Calculator
short_description: Perform quick numeric calculations directly within text including sums, totals, and averages without switching to a separate calculator.

title: Text Cleaner
short_description: Clean messy text instantly by removing extra spaces, unwanted characters, and formatting issues to produce neat and readable content.

title: Text Reverser
short_description: Reverse characters, words, or entire sentences instantly for fun experiments, encoding tricks, or quick text manipulation.

title: Text Shuffle
short_description: Randomly shuffle letters, words, or lines of text to create unique variations, scrambled content, or randomized lists.

title: Text Sorter
short_description: Sort text lines alphabetically, numerically, or in reverse order to quickly organize lists, datasets, or structured text.

title: Whitespace Remover
short_description: Remove extra spaces, tabs, and unnecessary whitespace from text to make it cleaner, more readable, and easier to process.

title: Word Counter
short_description: Count words, characters, sentences, and paragraphs instantly to analyze text length, readability, and writing structure.
